WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

Fact arity issues
=================

Same fact is used with different arities, i.e., Fact('A','B') is different from Fact('A'). 
Check the arguments of your facts.
  

  Fact `bt':

    1. Rule `R1', arity 1
         Bt( ~x )
    
    2. Rule `R2', arity 3
         Bt( ~x, ~y, ~z )
    
    3. Lemma `L', arity 3
         Fact {factTag = ProtoFact Linear "Bt" 3, factAnnotations = fromList [], factTerms = [Bound 3,Bound 2,Bound 1]}
    
    4. Lemma `L', arity 3
         Fact {factTag = ProtoFact Linear "Bt" 3, factAnnotations = fromList [], factTerms = [Bound 4,Bound 3,Bound 2]}
  
*/
